metadata.description: Official marketplace for taskmd Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: taskmd
plugins.description: Manage tasks stored as markdown files with taskmd. List, create, complete, and validate tasks directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: taskmd-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for taskmd. Provides direct tool access for task operations without shelling out to the CLI.

plugins.name: taskmd-lite
plugins.description: CLI-free taskmd plugin. Manage tasks using only Claude's native tools — no CLI binary required.
